name: local/istio-upgrade-skill
description: Use when the user asks about upgrading Istio, checking Istio version compatibility, planning an Istio migration, performing pre-upgrade validation, or preparing for an Istio version bump. Checks CRD compatibility, validates sidecar proxy version skew, reviews EnvoyFilter deprecated API usage, analyzes east-west gateway and federation compatibility, identifies breaking changes across intermediate Istio releases, and produces a scored upgrade readiness assessment with go/no-go recommendation.
